issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing critical parameters: must specify that you look at top 5 cards, filter for type 'Whitebeard Pirates' excluding [Izo], reveal up to 1 card, and place rest at bottom in any order. Current filter is generic 'Any' with no type restriction or exclusion logic.

DSL does not capture the full effect: (1) looking at 5 cards from top, (2) filtering by type including 'Whitebeard Pirates' AND excluding card name [Izo], (3) revealing up to 1 card, (4) returning remaining cards to bottom of deck in any order. Current action only attempts one search without these nuances.
